messages.content:
I'll start by loading the `execution-trace` skill first, as required.





Now loading the `report-analyzer` skill:



Now I will analyze the lab PDF and generate the 8 structured BloomCell records. Based on the report-analyzer skill instructions, I will produce exactly 8 JSON objects from the PDF at `https://ncameodemostorage.blob.core.windows.net/ncameo/wiaipqkyiohiiaxfiles/-8584208578865771754Document_1.pdf` — Document_1.pdf — a lab report, applying BloomCell functional ranges and clinical framework.



Now storing all 8 merged records in Cosmos DB one by one. Starting with Record 1:✅ Record 1 saved. Now storing Record 2:✅ Record 2 saved. Now storing Record 3:✅ Record 3 saved. Now storing Record 4:✅ Record 4 saved. Now storing Record 5:✅ Record 5 saved. Now storing Record 6:✅ Record 6 saved. Now storing Record 7:✅ Record 7 saved. Now storing Record 8:



8 records saved successfully.
